name: contact-form

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with name, phone, email, message and file attachment fields
changelog.1.1.0: Made phone, email, and message fields optional with defaults
changelog.1.2.0: Added initialValues prop to pre-fill form fields
changelog.1.2.1: Added aria-label to file removal button for screen reader accessibility
changelog.1.2.4: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.2.5: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.2.6: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.1.2.7: Fixed missing popover dependency for shadcn CLI installation
changelog.1.2.8: Extracted country data to separate countries.ts file
changelog.1.2.9: Show demo data when rendered without props

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with name, phone, email, message and file attachment fields
changelog.1.1.0: Made phone, email, and message fields optional with defaults
changelog.1.2.0: Added initialValues prop to pre-fill form fields
changelog.1.2.1: Added aria-label to file removal button for screen reader accessibility
changelog.1.2.4: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.2.5: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.2.6: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.1.2.7: Fixed missing popover dependency for shadcn CLI installation
changelog.1.2.8: Extracted country data to separate countries.ts file
changelog.1.2.9: Show demo data when rendered without props

title: Contact Form
author: MNFST, Inc
description: A complete contact form with name fields, phone with country selector, email, message textarea, and file attachment.

files.content:

  code: string
  name: string
  flag: string
}
